{'reasoning': 'The rubber band will snap to form a convex hull around the points. The points on the convex hull are the ones the rubber band touches. I used the Graham Scan algorithm to find the convex hull and then returned the indices of the points in the order they appear on the hull.', 'pointSequence': [130, 337, 717, 281, 261, 425, 395, 312,
